About

I'm a Staff Software Engineer at GitHub, where I'm building GitHub Models. I care deeply about developer experience, making complex infrastructure feel simple, and building tools that get out of your way. Originally from Cologne, now somewhere in the PNW chasing summit views.

2020 → now
Staff Software Engineer
GitHub · Models, Actions, Copilot
Currently building GitHub Models. Previously helped ship and scale GitHub Actions and contributed to Copilot.
2014 → 2020
Engineering Lead
Microsoft · Azure DevOps
Led engineering on planning, tracking, and developer collaboration experiences.
